Container.Name: Rensaiō
Container.Overview: Rensaiō a feature-complete series manager powered by Mihon Extensions.

Config.Name: Config Folder
Config.Description: Path to store configuration, database, and settings.

Config.Name: Series Folder
Config.Description: Path where series and chapters will be downloaded.

Config.Name: UID
Config.Description: User ID to run the container as.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID to run the container as.
